mapper.select: SELECT r.record_id, driving_student.student_name, l.charge_ltem_name, role.role_name, l.amount , pay.pay_type, r.create_time FROM `driving_bill_record` r LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem l ON r.charge_ltem_id=l.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN sys_role role ON r.role_id=role.role_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay pay ON pay.pay_id=r.pay_id LEFT JOIN driving_student ON r.user_id=driving_student.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) annual_total_income FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) annual_total_expenditure FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) total_income FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) total_expense FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) studentPayment FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) otherIncome FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) AS monthIncome FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id = b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id = b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(b.create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT DISTINCT sys_role.role_id FROM sys_role JOIN driving_bill_record r ON r.role_id=sys_role.role_id WHERE r.user_id=1001
